name: paperclip-desktop
description: Paperclip desktop application — Electron wrapper for the Paperclip server

scripts.test:connections: pnpm build && node --test test/connection-validate.test.mjs test/connection-preflight.test.mjs test/connection-profiles.test.mjs test/window-policy.test.mjs test/navigation-gestures.test.mjs test/local-server-lifecycle.test.mjs test/local-server-health.test.mjs
scripts.pack: pnpm build && pnpm prepare-server && pnpm build-ui && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: pnpm build && pnpm prepare-server && pnpm build-ui && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: pnpm build && pnpm prepare-server && pnpm build-ui && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm build && pnpm prepare-server && pnpm build-ui && electron-builder --linux --publish never
